name: Luminara
description: Coaxes a small star-glow from the caster's wand to reveal hidden markings and steady the mind.

name: Ember Spark
description: A brisk bolt of warm amber fire favored by first-year duelists.

name: Wardweave
description: Braids a translucent shield that softens the next hostile charm.

name: Silver Mend
description: Knits minor bruises with cool silver light during tense expeditions.

name: Aether Lash
description: Cracks a ribbon of force across the dueling floor, testing courage and precision.

name: Thorncall
description: Summons spectral vines that interrupt creatures and careless rivals alike.
